title: Menu Item
description: Action item inside a menu (dropdown/context/overflow). Prefer <button> or <a> depending on action vs navigation.

props.name: danger
props.description: Marks a destructive action; requires confirmation in many contexts.

states.name: highlighted
effects: Background highlight; keep text readable in both themes.

keyboard: Menu navigation is handled by the parent menu using arrow keys and roving tabindex.
aria: Checkbox items use role="menuitemcheckbox" with aria-checked.
Radio items use role="menuitemradio" with aria-checked.

must: Item must have a clear label and consistent spacing/alignment.
Disabled items must not be focusable when possible.
should: Support optional icons and keyboard shortcuts (display only).
Danger items should be visually distinct but still readable.
must_not: Do not put form fields inside a menu unless it is a combobox or dedicated popover.

token_usage.notes: Use muted background for highlight state.
Use fast motion for hover/highlight transitions.
